title: carex hirtifructus
intro: Carex hirtifructus, also known as Hairy-fruited Sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory qualities, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Carex hirtifructus include its ability to support the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Carex hirtifructus can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
